creative_brief: Clean, minimal design. Open with the quoted objection in large italic text as a visual anchor. Single green CTA button below the final line. No hero image — let the copy carry the weight. Mobile-first layout with generous white space.
subject: If you wait until the round opens, you lose first access
preheader: The VIP list closes before the campaign goes live. 73 spots claimed this week.
body:
Hi there,

Last Tuesday a mum from Dee Why messaged me: "I just want to know my kids aren't eating food that's travelled 2,400km in a refrigerated truck."

That's the whole reason FarmThru exists. Farm-direct groceries from NSW growers — ordered online, collected from our Brookvale hub Monday to Friday. No middlemen inflating the price. No mystery supply chains.

But here's the part most people miss.

If you secure a VIP spot now — $5, fully refundable — you get first access when our equity crowdfunding round opens on Birchal. If you wait until launch day, you're behind every VIP in the queue.

That matters because the minimum investment is $50, and the cap is $10,000 per investor. Early rounds fill. People who hesitate get locked out.

So the maths is simple: $5 holds your place. You get priority updates, exclusive Q&A with me, and first access to own a piece of a grocery store that actually shows you where your food comes from.

No commitment beyond that. If you change your mind, you get your $5 back. No questions.

But I can't hold spots open forever. Once VIP closes, it closes.

This week 73 people joined. They're parents, home cooks, people tired of scanning labels and guessing. They want to look their kids in the eye and say, "I know exactly where this came from."

If that's you — join them before the list closes.

→ Secure your $5 refundable VIP spot now

This is not financial advice. Consider seeking independent financial advice. Full details in the disclosure document on Birchal.

Rachel & the FarmThru team
